name: slack_read_messages
description: Read messages from a Slack channel. Requires channel ID (use slack_find_channel first to get the ID). Returns recent messages with user information and timestamps.

channel.description: Channel ID (e.g., C1234567890). Use slack_find_channel to get this.

oldest.description: Start of time range of messages to include (timestamp)

latest.description: End of time range of messages to include (timestamp)

inclusive.description: Include messages with latest or oldest timestamp in results

channel.description: Auto-extract channel ID from slack_find_channel results

response_transformer.description: Transform Slack messages API response to standardized format

examples.name: Read messages from specific time range
